items.title: Kumanjayi Little Baby remembered across NT after 'unthinkable trauma'

children.content: The Northern Territory is continuing to grieve the short life of a five-year-old girl today, with crowds in Alice Springs to pay tribute by donning pink — her favourite colour.

gallery.altText: Flowers on a fence with a note reading fly high baby girl

items.title: As fuel costs soar, cycling advocates argue our priorities are all wrong

children.content: Bike shops in Darwin are experiencing soaring demand as more people turn to one of the oldest and simplest alternatives to cars amid skyrocketing fuel prices, but advocates say the federal government is still prioritising drivers.

image.altText: A man smiles in a bike workshop.

items.title: Police charge Jefferson Lewis, 47, with 5yo girl's murder

children.content: Northern Territory Police have charged Jefferson Lewis with the murder of five-year-old Kumanjayi Little Baby in Alice Springs.

image.altText: A mugshot of an Aboriginal man, serious expression looking directly at camera, yellow / orange pigment behind brown eyes.

items.title: Police release CCTV of 'outright looting' of Alice Springs businesses

children.content: NT Police have released CCTV footage of the "outright looting" of businesses caught up in rioting following the arrest of Jefferson Lewis for the murder of Kumanjayi Little Baby.

image.altText: A large group of people swarms into a service station

articles.title: After Little Baby's death, Canavan demands government stop 'running scared'

children.content: Nationals leader Matthew Canavan says after the death of Kumanjayi Little Baby, the government must "move on" from its defeat at the Voice referendum and re-engage on Indigenous policy debate.

image.altText: Nationals Leader Matt Canavan gesturing while wearing a suit, with a screen behind him.

articles.title: Kumanjayi Little Baby's grandfather thanks community, says time to 'let justice take its course'

children.content: The family of five-year-old Kumanjayi Little Baby, whose body was found on the outskirts of Alice Springs on Thursday, has thanked the community for their support as tributes flow in from across the country.

image.altText: A teddy bear among floral tributes

items.title: What is a town camp and what is life like there for Aboriginal people?

children.content: Kumanjayi Little Baby is believed to have been taken from her bed at night while visiting a town camp near Alice Springs with her mother. This is how town camps came to be.

image.altText: A drone shot of saltbush and roads in Alice Springs

items.title: Family of Tiwi Islands sistergirl calls for life sentence for man who killed her
